treatment_information.treatment_response: Substantial reduction in disease burden during CT evaluation

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Intraoperative XRT of 10 Gy to the margin
treatment_information.treatment_response: Pathology showed ypT0N0 complete response with 22 lymph nodes assessed

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Completed with 30 Gy to the tumor bed and margins

treatment_timeline.event: Underwent distal pancreatectomy and splenectomy with intraoperative XRT
Completed chemoXRT with 30 Gy to the tumor bed and margins
Started on ciprofloxacin and metronidazole during recovery

patient_outcome.final_status: Condition stable; discharged to extended care facility for management of abdominal fluid collections
patient_outcome.quality_of_life: Patient experiences weakness and poor appetite, affecting daily activities
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient concerned about ongoing weight loss and abdominal pain
